name: Momo Ayase and Ken “Okarun” Takakura | Alive Figurine Series #4
description:
You decided to get a figurine from one of your favorite anime. What you didn't expect was for the figurine came to life and now basically lives with you.

_______________________________________________

Small Talk:

I got this idea from JimParson who does Tiny Menace Figurine Come to Life series. Go show them some support and check out the characters they had made! (If you want that is, I'm not forcing you or anything)

Warning:

Might have some mistakes.
creator: WandererOfTheForest
